DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $311.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, WILLIAM

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-09-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
